basic_details.job_title: IMH Kilpauk Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 27 DEO, Office Assistant and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Institute of Mental Health Kilpauk (IMH Kilpauk)
basic_details.post_name: DEO, Office Assistant and More Posts

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Phil. Clinical Psychology (RCI recognized), Master's in Medical & Psychiatric Social Work, PG in Statistics/Biostatistics, B.Com with Tally and Data Entry, +2 with Certificate in Psychiatry Supportive Worker, VIII Pass
qualification.details: Clinical Psychologist: UG, PG in Psychology / Rehabilitation Psychology / Clinical Psychology / Health Psychology / Child Psychology / Counselling Psychology / Applied Psychology. UGC recognized. Preferably PG thesis in technology Addiction. RCI recognized University, RCI registered. Counsellor/General psychologist: UG, PG in Psychology / Rehabilitation Psychology / Clinical Psychology / Health Psychology / Child Psychology / Counselling Psychology / Applied Psychology. UGC recognized. Preferably PG thesis in technology Addiction. Psychiatry Social Worker: Master's in Medical & Psychiatric Social Work. PG thesis in Family Studies. Statistician: PG in Statistics/ Biostatistics from a recognized university or Institution. Proficiency in statistical analysis and use of statistical software such as SPSS, R, STATA or equivalent; interpretation of research data and MS office application. Preferable project in social/Behavioural/ Biological sciences. Accountant cum data entry operator: B. Com, Tally, Data entry skills, Photoshop. Psychiatry support worker: + 2, Certificate course in psychiatry supportive worker. Office Assistant: VIII passed should be literate.

salary_details.details: Clinical Psychologist: Rs.53,000 + Rs.2,000 TA Counsellor/General psychologist: Rs.28,000 + Rs.2,000 TA Psychiatry Social Worker: Rs.28,000 + Rs.2,000 TA Statistician: Rs.30,000 Accountant cum data entry operator: Rs.20,000 Psychiatry support worker: Rs.13,000 + Rs.2,000 TA Office Assistant: Rs.12,000

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website:https://tnhealth.tn.gov.in/ .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 08-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download IMH Kilpauk Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IMH Kilpauk recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the IMH Kilpauk Various Contractual Posts is 08 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 27 vacancies for various contractual posts at the Institute of Mental Health Kilpauk.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Offline. Candidates need to send their application form to the official address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum qualification required for the Office Assistant post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required for the Office Assistant post is VIII pass, and the candidate should be literate.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for a Clinical Psychologist?
faq.answer: The salary for a Clinical Psychologist is Rs.53,000 plus Rs.2,000 TA.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is being conducted by the Institute of Mental Health Kilpauk (IMH Kilpauk).

faq.question: Q9. What is the qualification for the Statistician post?
faq.answer: The qualification for the Statistician post is a PG in Statistics/Biostatistics from a recognized university or Institution, with proficiency in statistical software.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be accessed through the Important Links section provided in this article.
